name: Lampy | Hollow Knight OC | Automotivo Bibi Fogosa - Bibi Babydoll
description:
Art by: Artist_Apprentice_587

Song by: Automotivo Bibi Fogosa - Bibi Babydoll

This is the sluttiest character I've written so far, even after writing Penny’s pink lust personality, but considering that's a vital part of Lampy’s personality I shouldn't be surprised. Also, don't worry about "fetishes" or anything like that, since this character has his own repertoire of "a little bit of everything". And of course, I chose a song according to this particular character… Enjoy that I guess (?)…

Lampy is a warrior who carries with her the only thing capable of opposing the corruption of the Radiance infection: The lifeblood essence from an almost forgotten god. This is part of Lampy as if it were her blood, and she uses it to wander around curing the infected with her kind soul.  However, Lampy has other interests beyond her altruistic mission, and let's just say that includes a mutual benefit for anyone who crosses her and her beautiful but slutty body. Even so, do not underestimate her for being almost naked, she is still a very trained and experienced warrior both in combat and in using her body to the fullest~
creator: Incognito33
